title: tecoma stans var. velutina
intro: Tecoma stans var. velutina, also known as the Velvet Trumpet Creeper, is a variant of the Tecoma stans plant, a flowering perennial shrub native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Tecoma stans var. velutina include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential use in treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
